results.description: The behavior tree represents a mobile robot tasked to visit two locations: (7,1) and (4,8). The available actions are: "MoveTo".
results.reference_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <MoveTo x="7" y="1"/>
      <MoveTo x="4" y="8"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <Done/>
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
            <Sequence>
                <MoveTo x="0" y="0"/>
                <MoveTo x="1" y="1"/>
                <MoveTo x="2" y="2"/>
                <MoveTo x="3" y="3"/>
            </Sequence>
     </BehaviorTree>  
</root>

results.description: The behavior tree represents a mobile robot tasked to visit a sequence of locations: ((0,0), (2,3), (4, 7), (5, 11)).  Each location is associated with a reading: (10, 20, 13, 27).  Location with a reading above 15 must be visited first. The available actions are: "MoveTo".
results.reference_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <MoveTo x="5" y="11" threshold="27"/>
      <MoveTo x="2" y="3" threshold="20"/>
      <MoveTo x="4" y="7" threshold="13"/>
      <MoveTo x="0" y="0" threshold="10"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <Done/>
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
            <Sequence>
                <MoveTo x="1" y="1"/>
                <MoveTo x="3" y="3"/>
                <MoveTo x="0" y="0"/>
                <MoveTo x="2" y="2"/>
            </Sequence>
     </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.generated_raw:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="main_tree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <MoveTo location="2,3"/>
      <MoveTo location="5,11"/>
      <MoveTo location="0,0"/>
      <MoveTo location="4,7"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.generated_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="main_tree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <MoveTo location="2,3"/>
      <MoveTo location="5,11"/>
      <MoveTo location="0,0"/>
      <MoveTo location="4,7"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.llm_judge_raw:
Looking at the constraint and the tree:

**Locations with readings > 15 (must visit first):**
- (2,3) → reading 20 ✓
- (5,11) → reading 27 ✓

**Locations with readings ≤ 15:**
- (0,0) → reading 10
- (4,7) → reading 13

**Tree execution order:**
1. MoveTo (2,3) ✓ reading > 15
2. MoveTo (5,11) ✓ reading > 15
3. MoveTo (0,0) ✓ reading ≤ 15
4. MoveTo (4,7) ✓ reading ≤ 15

All high-reading locations visited first, then low-reading locations. Matches constraint.

**Correct**

results.description: The behavior tree represents a mobile robot tasked to visit a sequence of locations: (0,0), (2,3), (4, 7), (5, 11).  During the navigation a location may become unreachable, if this happens, skip it and move to the next one.  The available actions are: "MoveTo", "isGoalReachable".
results.reference_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
      <Sequence> 
          <ForceSuccess>
              <Parallel success_count="2" failure_count="1">                
                  <isGoalReachable/>                              
                  <MoveTo x="0" y="0"/> 
              </Parallel>
          </ForceSuccess>
          <ForceSuccess>
              <Parallel success_count="2" failure_count="1">                
                  <isGoalReachable/>                              
                  <MoveTo x="2" y="3"/> 
              </Parallel>
          </ForceSuccess>         
          <ForceSuccess>
              <Parallel success_count="2" failure_count="1">                
                  <isGoalReachable/>                              
                  <MoveTo x="4" y="7"/> 
              </Parallel>
          </ForceSuccess>   
          <ForceSuccess>
              <Parallel success_count="2" failure_count="1">                
                  <isGoalReachable/>                              
                  <MoveTo x="5" y="11"/> 
              </Parallel>
          </ForceSuccess>
      </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <Done />
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <Sequence>
            <Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <CheckReachable />
                    <MoveTo x="0" y="0" />
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Continue />
            </Fallback>
            <Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <CheckReachable />
                    <MoveTo x="1" y="1" />
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Continue />
            </Fallback>
            <Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <CheckReachable />
                    <MoveTo x="2" y="2" />
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Continue />
            </Fallback>
            <Fallback>
                <ReactiveSequence>
                    <CheckReachable />
                    <MoveTo x="3" y="3" />
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Continue />
            </Fallback>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.generated_raw:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="main_tree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <ForceSuccess>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable goal="0;0"/>
          <MoveTo goal="0;0"/>
        </Sequence>
      </ForceSuccess>
      <ForceSuccess>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable goal="2;3"/>
          <MoveTo goal="2;3"/>
        </Sequence>
      </ForceSuccess>
      <ForceSuccess>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable goal="4;7"/>
          <MoveTo goal="4;7"/>
        </Sequence>
      </ForceSuccess>
      <ForceSuccess>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable goal="5;11"/>
          <MoveTo goal="5;11"/>
        </Sequence>
      </ForceSuccess>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.generated_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="main_tree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <ForceSuccess>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable goal="0;0"/>
          <MoveTo goal="0;0"/>
        </Sequence>
      </ForceSuccess>
      <ForceSuccess>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable goal="2;3"/>
          <MoveTo goal="2;3"/>
        </Sequence>
      </ForceSuccess>
      <ForceSuccess>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable goal="4;7"/>
          <MoveTo goal="4;7"/>
        </Sequence>
      </ForceSuccess>
      <ForceSuccess>
        <Sequence>
          <isGoalReachable goal="5;11"/>
          <MoveTo goal="5;11"/>
        </Sequence>
      </ForceSuccess>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.llm_judge_raw:
**Correct**

Tree structure matches description:

- **Sequence of locations**: ✓ 4 ForceSuccess blocks visit (0,0) → (2,3) → (4,7) → (5,11) in order
- **Skip unreachable, continue to next**: ✓ ForceSuccess wrapper always returns SUCCESS. If isGoalReachable fails (location unreachable), inner Sequence stops + fails, ForceSuccess converts to SUCCESS, outer Sequence continues to next location
- **Actions used**: ✓ isGoalReachable checks reachability, MoveTo navigates

results.description: The behavior tree represents a mobile manipulator tasked to visit a location at (7,1).  After reaching the location, the mobile manipulator activates the robotic arm.  The available actions are: "moveTo", "ActivateManipulator".
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <Done/>
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <Sequence>
            <Sequence>
                <MoveTo x="0" y="0"/>
                <ActivateManipulator/>
            </Sequence>
            <Sequence>
                <MoveTo x="1" y="1"/>
                <ActivateManipulator/>
            </Sequence>
            <Sequence>
                <MoveTo x="2" y="2"/>
                <ActivateManipulator/>
            </Sequence>
            <Sequence>
                <MoveTo x="3" y="3"/>
                <ActivateManipulator/>
            </Sequence>
        </Sequence>
     </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.llm_judge_raw:
Correct

Tree matches description:
- Sequence executes children in order
- `moveTo x="7" y="1"` reaches target location
- `ActivateManipulator` follows after
- Sequential execution = "after reaching, then activate"

results.description: The behavior tree represents a mobile robot tasked asked to explore an area.  The available actions are: "GenerateNextDestination", "MoveTo", "isExplorationComplete".
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="10">
                    <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                </RetryUntilSuccessful>
                <Done/>
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <Sequence>
            <GenerateNextDestination/>
            <MoveToDestination/>
            <CheckForExplorationComplete/>
        </Sequence>
     </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.llm_judge_raw:
Incorrect.

Description lists only purpose + available actions. Doesn't describe tree structure or logic.

Actual tree behavior: Loops until failure. Each cycle, reactive fallback tries `isExplorationComplete` first; if false, runs sequence to generate next destination then move. Description omits this control flow entirely.

results.description: The behavior tree represents a manipulator tasked to find and reach a target.  The manipulator moves in different locations and check for the presence of a target object.  When the target is found, approach it.  The available actions are: "MoveTo", "CheckForTarget", "PickTarget".
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="10">
                    <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                </RetryUntilSuccessful>
                <Done />
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <Sequence>
            <Sequence>
                <MoveToNewConfiguration />
                <CheckForTarget />
            </Sequence>
            <ApproachTarget />
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.llm_judge_raw:
Correct

Tree logic:
- RetryUntilSuccessful loops MoveTo + CheckForTarget until target found
- Then executes PickTarget
- Matches description: move to locations, check for target, approach when found

results.description: The behavior tree represents a manipulator tasked to perform a pick and place routine.  The manipulator observe the item from multiple points of view and each time tries to estimate a grasp.  If the systems fails to identify a grasp after five observations, the action fails and the arm return to a resting position. When the grasp is successfully estimated, the manipulator moves to the "ready" state, picks the item and drop it to a predefined location, a chest in this case. After the drop, the arm moves to a resting position.  The available actions are:  "EstimateGrasp", "Pick", "Drop", "MoveManipulator".
results.reference_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
      <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="5">
          <Sequence>
              <EstimateGrasp/>
              <MoveManipulator state="ready"/>
              <Pick object="item"/>
              <Drop location="chest"/>
              <MoveManipulator state="resting"/>
          </Sequence>
      </RetryUntilSuccessful>
  </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4"  main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <Done/>
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    
    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="5">
                    <Sequence>
                        <PerformObservation />
                        <EstimateGrasp />
                    </Sequence>
                </RetryUntilSuccessful>
                <Pick />
                <MoveToDropPosition />
                <Drop />
                <MoveToRestPosition />
            </Sequence>
            <MoveToRestPosition />
        </Fallback>
     </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.generated_raw:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="main_tree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <Fallback>
        <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="5">
          <Sequence>
            <MoveManipulator target="observe"/>
            <EstimateGrasp/>
          </Sequence>
        </RetryUntilSuccessful>
        <ForceFailure>
          <MoveManipulator target="resting"/>
        </ForceFailure>
      </Fallback>
      <MoveManipulator target="ready"/>
      <Pick/>
      <Drop target="chest"/>
      <MoveManipulator target="resting"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.generated_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="main_tree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <Fallback>
        <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="5">
          <Sequence>
            <MoveManipulator target="observe"/>
            <EstimateGrasp/>
          </Sequence>
        </RetryUntilSuccessful>
        <ForceFailure>
          <MoveManipulator target="resting"/>
        </ForceFailure>
      </Fallback>
      <MoveManipulator target="ready"/>
      <Pick/>
      <Drop target="chest"/>
      <MoveManipulator target="resting"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

results.description: The behavior tree represents a manipulator tasked to push buttons in a specific sequence to transform raw materials into processed materials. Use "Button R" to receive the raw materials. Use "Button P" to start the processing. Use "Button C" to complete the processing.  The manipulator has to first receive the raw material, then start the processing, and finally complete the processing.  The manipulator has to periodically check the status of the materials to decide when the processing is complete. The available actions are: "PressButton", "EvaluateProcessing".
results.reference_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Parallel success_count="2" failure_count="1">                
      <EvaluateProcessing/>                              
      <Sequence>
        <PressButton button="Button R"/>
        <PressButton button="Button P"/>
        <PressButton button="Button C"/>
      </Sequence>
    </Parallel>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <SubTree ID="TheTree" />
                <Done/>
            </Sequence>
            <Fail />
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="TheTree">
        <SequenceWithMemory>
            <PressButton label="Button R"/>
            <PressButton label="Button P"/>
            <Sequence>
                <EvaluateProcessing/>
            </Sequence>
            <PressButton label="Button C"/>
        </SequenceWithMemory>
     </BehaviorTree>  
</root>
results.generated_raw:
```xml
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="main_tree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <PressButton button="Button R"/>
      <PressButton button="Button P"/>
      <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="-1">
        <EvaluateProcessing/>
      </RetryUntilSuccessful>
      <PressButton button="Button C"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
```
results.generated_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="main_tree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <PressButton button="Button R"/>
      <PressButton button="Button P"/>
      <RetryUntilSuccessful num_attempts="-1">
        <EvaluateProcessing/>
      </RetryUntilSuccessful>
      <PressButton button="Button C"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>

results.description: The behavior tree represents a mobile manipulator tasked to move between multiple stations to assemble a product.  The order of actions is the following.  Start from parking position and move to "Station A". In "Station A" pick up "Component A" and put it on the robot tray.  Move to "Station C" and deliver "Component A". Activate the assembly process. Collect the finished product and put it in the robot tray. Deliver the finished product to the parking position.  The available actions are: "moveTo", "Pick", "Drop", "ActivateProcess".
results.reference_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <MoveTo location="Station A"/>
      <Pick from="Station A" item="Component A"/>
      <Drop to="tray"/>
      <MoveTo location="Station C"/>
      <Pick from="tray" item="Component A"/>
      <Drop to="Station C"/>
      <ActivateProcess/>
      <Pick from="Station C" item="Finished product"/>
      <Drop to="tray"/>
      <MoveTo location="Parking"/>
      <Pick from="tray" item="Finished product"/>
      <Drop to="Parking"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.validator_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
    <BehaviorTree>
        <Sequence>
            <Fallback>
                <Sequence>
                    <MoveTo location="Station A"/>
                    <Pick from="station" item="Component A"/>
                    <Drop to="tray"/>
                    <MoveTo location="Station B"/>
                    <Pick from="station" item="Component B"/>
                    <Drop to="tray"/>
                    <MoveTo location="Station C"/>
                    <Pick from="tray" item="Component A"/>
                    <Drop to="station"/>
                    <Pick from="tray" item="Component B"/>
                    <Drop to="station"/>
                    <MoveTo location="Station D"/>
                    <ActivateProcess/>
                    <MoveTo location="Station C"/>
                    <Pick from="station" item="Finished product"/>
                    <Drop to="tray"/>
                    <MoveTo location="Park"/>
                    <Pick from="tray" item="Finished product"/>
                    <Drop to="station"/>
                </Sequence>
                <Sequence>
                    <MoveTo location="Park"/>
                    <EmptyTray/>
                </Sequence>
            </Fallback>
            <Done />
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>
results.generated_raw:
```xml
<root BTCPP_format="4" main_tree_to_execute="main_tree">
  <BehaviorTree ID="main_tree">
    <Sequence>
      <moveTo target="Station A"/>
      <Pick object="Component A"/>
      <Drop location="robot tray"/>
      <moveTo target="Station C"/>
      <Drop object="Component A"/>
      <ActivateProcess/>
      <Pick object="finished product"/>
      <Drop location="robot tray"/>
      <moveTo target="parking position"/>
      <Drop object="finished product"/>
    </Sequence>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
```
